text:
Quagga 0.99.13..0.9.15

# zebra
Abort trap: 6

# zebra --version
Abort trap: 6

$ CFLAGS="-O" ./configure --includedir=/usr/local/include 
--enable-exampledir=/usr/loca/share/examples/quagga 
--enable-user=quagga 
--enable-group=quagga 
--sysconfdir=/usr/local/etc/quagga 
--localstatedir=/var/run/quagga 
--enable-vtysh 
--enable-isisd 
--without-libpam 
--enable-snmp=no 
--mandir=/usr/local/man 
--infodir=/usr/local/info 
--enable-exampledir=/usr/local/share/examples/quagga/ 
--enable-opaque-lsa 
--prefix=/usr/local 
--build=i386-ziggi-freebsd8.0
